title: Show HN: Decomp Academy – Learn to decompile GameCube games into matching C
summary: Decomp Academy 是一个免费开源的交互式学习平台，教授如何将 GameCube 游戏的 PowerPC 汇编反编译为匹配的 C 代码。
translated_summary: Decomp Academy is a free, open-source interactive platform that teaches how to decompile GameCube game PowerPC assembly into matching C code, with 250+ lessons and live compiler verification.
